detaileddescription.para: The deint Layer-2 Driver. The functions in this file provides an abstraction from the register peek/poke methodology by implementing most common use-case provided by the sub-core. See xv_deinterlacer_l2.h for a detailed description of the layer-2 driver

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.00 rco 07/21/15 Initial Release 6.00 rco 11/05/15 Integrate layer-1 with layer-2 dmc 02/25/16 add public routine XV_DeintWaitForIdle()
